entries.title: Trend Pullback Second-Entry Continuation
entries.reason: 20-bar context does not show trend sequence or clear close relative to 20 SMA.

entries.title: Trend Pullback Second-Entry Continuation
entries.reason: Pullback occurs inside a narrow overlapping range with no trend resumption evidence.

entries.title: Trend Pullback Second-Entry Continuation
entries.reason: Strong opposite breakout with follow-through cancels the continuation premise.

entries.title: Trend Pullback Second-Entry Continuation
entries.reason: Not enough bars to evaluate trend, pullback, and second-entry sequence.

entries.title: Breakout Follow-Through Continuation
entries.reason: Breakout bar body is below 50% of true range or close is not in the directional third.

entries.title: Breakout Follow-Through Continuation
entries.reason: No confirmation close within the next 1-2 bars.

entries.title: Breakout Follow-Through Continuation
entries.reason: Price closes back inside the prior range before confirmation.

entries.title: Breakout Follow-Through Continuation
entries.reason: Prior range height is too small to evaluate after cost/slippage tiers.

entries.title: Trading Range Failed Breakout Reversal
entries.reason: Range has fewer than 20 bars or does not show overlapping two-sided structure.

entries.title: Trading Range Failed Breakout Reversal
entries.reason: Breakout has follow-through or does not close back inside within 1-3 bars.

entries.title: Trading Range Failed Breakout Reversal
entries.reason: Range high/low cannot be determined from OHLCV without after-the-fact selection.

entries.title: Trading Range Failed Breakout Reversal
entries.reason: Range is too narrow for costs or too wide for the configured risk budget.

entries.title: Opening Range Breakout
entries.reason: Missing regular-session open, timezone, or first-30-minute bars.

entries.title: Opening Range Breakout
entries.reason: Opening range is too narrow for cost/slippage tiers.

entries.title: Opening Range Breakout
entries.reason: Opening range stop distance exceeds the pilot risk budget.

entries.title: Opening Range Breakout
entries.reason: Failed ORB is routed to Opening Reversal or Trading Range Failed Breakout queues, not executed here.
